new_pool.title: Pick a name for the new pool

new_light.title: Set up the new notification light wrapper

data.name: Notification Light Name
data.dynamic_priority: Dynamic 'On' Priority (inherit active light priority + 0.5 when switched on)
data.peek_time: Duration to temporarily display lower-priority notifications

data_description.warmup_time: Extra hold time for the initial color if the bulb was off when the notification started. Use this for bulbs that are slow to turn on.

data.name: Notification Light Name
data.dynamic_priority: Dynamic 'On' Priority (inherit active light priority + 0.5 when switched on)
data.peek_time: Duration to temporarily display lower-priority notifications

data_description.warmup_time: Extra hold time for the initial color if the bulb was off when the notification started. Use this for bulbs that are slow to turn on.

stop_preview.name: Stop preview
stop_preview.description: Stop any running preview sequence on a ColorNotify light wrapper.

preview_sequence.name: Preview sequence
preview_sequence.description: Play a temporary notification sequence on a ColorNotify light wrapper to preview what it will look like.

pattern.name: Pattern
pattern.description: List of pattern entries (JSON color objects, '[', or '],N').

color_picker.name: Color
color_picker.description: Solid RGB color used when no pattern is provided.

preview_duration.name: Preview duration
preview_duration.description: Seconds before the preview automatically clears.

error.select_test_light: Select a light to preview the sequence on

menu_options.add_notification_sample: Create a new notification (with sample pattern)
menu_options.add_notification_copy: Create a new notification (copy an existing)

add_notification.description:
Set up the notification below.
•Auto-Clear with a 0s timeout clears immediately after the pattern finishes.
•Any other timeout is measured from notification start.
•Larger numbers are higher priority.

data.name: Name for notification
data.peek_enabled: Temporarily show on activation, regardless of priority.

data_description.pattern: Each '+' entry is a color step. Use '[' to open a loop and '], N' to close it (N = 0 for infinite). Leave empty to show a solid color instead.
data_description.color_picker: If no pattern steps are defined above, this color is the notification's display color. To add this color as a step in the sequence, choose 'Append selected color to pattern' below.

modify_notification.description:
Set up the notification below.
•Auto-Clear with a 0s timeout clears immediately after the pattern finishes.
•Any other timeout is measured from notification start.
•Larger numbers are higher priority.

data.name: Name for notification
data.peek_enabled: Temporarily show on activation, regardless of priority.

data_description.pattern: Each '+' entry is a color step. Use '[' to open a loop and '], N' to close it (N = 0 for infinite). Leave empty to show a solid color instead.
data_description.color_picker: If no pattern steps are defined above, this color is the notification's display color. To add this color as a step in the sequence, choose 'Append selected color to pattern' below.

subscriptions.description:
Subscribe to entire pools and/or individual notifications
Use 'Reconfigure' to update other bulb settings.
